title: Vision & Goals
vision: To build practical, reliable software systems that solve real operational problems through simple architecture, maintainable development, and real-world product thinking.

shortTerm: Strengthen backend-focused full-stack development with emphasis on APIs, workflows, and scalable system design.
Improve expertise in Node.js, NestJS, MongoDB, and real-time application architecture.
Build maintainable SaaS systems with better reliability, performance, and clean backend structure.
Develop stronger understanding of authentication systems, deployment workflows, and backend optimization.
Improve debugging and problem-solving skills through practical product development.
Validate ideas through small, fast prototypes before investing in large-scale implementation.
longTerm: Build complete end-to-end SaaS products focused on solving real operational problems.
Design scalable and maintainable systems grounded in practical usage and user feedback.
Create products that are simple, affordable, and easy to use.
Develop strong product thinking through real-world validation and iteration.
Build reliable backend systems with clean architecture and long-term maintainability.
Balance independent execution with effective collaboration in product-focused teams.

values: Solve real problems, not unnecessary complexity
Learn through practical building and iteration
